collection.name: Eternal Creations — Michelangelo Posthumous Originals
collection.description: Authenticated posthumous original castings from Michelangelo's master molds, executed in precious metals. Each piece is a unique single casting preserving the original composition with museum-grade fidelity.
collection.medium: Precious metal castings (silver, gold, platinum) via lost-wax process

edition_info.edition_notes: 150+ authenticated posthumous originals spanning multiple masterpieces including Battle of the Centaurs, The Pietà, and David. Each casting is a one-of-one edition in a specific precious metal.

body.burn_rule: Burning this Collection Parent permanently closes the collection. No new Genesis inscriptions may be created under it. Existing provenance chains remain valid.
